title: wolfhsm: counter.rs and cryptocb.rs
description: counter.rs: Counter{id:NvmId} struct; Counter::init, increment, read, reset, destroy (consumes self). cryptocb.rs: DEV_ID: i32 = 0x5748_534D (WHSM); register(client) -> Result<CryptoCbGuard, Error> using AtomicBool to reject double-registration; CryptoCbGuard RAII drops via wc_CryptoCb_UnRegisterDevice(DEV_ID) and clears AtomicBool; guard borrows client lifetime.
